chapters.lead: Some things are worth counting. Not out of obsession — but because each number is a tiny piece of a story.

beats.title: Messages
beats.subtitle: One conversation at a time
beats.narrative: 5,440 messages. Each one a small thread in the fabric of an entire year. A word here, a laugh there — little moments that quietly added up to something real.

beats.title: Days Together
beats.subtitle: A year of showing up
beats.narrative: Out of 346 days, conversation never really stopped. 15.7 messages a day on average — not because you had to, but because you wanted to.

beats.title: Reels Shared
beats.subtitle: A shorthand of their own
beats.narrative: 138 reels passed between you. Little dispatches that said "this reminded me of you" — a shorthand that needed no explanation.

beats.title: Shared Moments
beats.subtitle: More than just words
beats.narrative: 340 photos, videos, and audio notes. Because sometimes words aren't enough, and sometimes a voice note or a picture says it better.

chapters.lead: Every conversation has a rhythm. A pattern. A season. This is what yours looked like from above.

beats.title: Your Rhythm
beats.subtitle: The pulse of a year
beats.narrative: Your conversations had their own cadence — sometimes a flood of words, sometimes a quiet trickle. Sometimes louder, sometimes quieter. Just two people keeping the thread going.

beats.title: May
beats.subtitle: The month you couldn't stop talking
beats.narrative: May was when the words spilled out fastest. Maybe it was the season. Maybe it was just the mood. Something about that month made you both a little more talkative.

beats.title: Longest Silence
beats.subtitle: Even the quiet meant something
beats.narrative: The longest stretch without talking was 4585 hours. In a year of thousands of messages, that gap says something too.

chapters.lead: Sooner or later, you develop your own language. Shorthand. Inside jokes. Things that only make sense between the two of you.

beats.title: Your Emoji Language
beats.subtitle: 😭😳😂 — a private vocabulary
beats.narrative: When words weren't enough, 😭 stepped in. And 😳. And 😂. A tiny visual language that no one else would read the same way.

beats.title: Short & Sweet
beats.subtitle: When less says more
beats.narrative: 76% of your messages were short — under thirty characters. A quick "okiee," a single emoji, a word that only makes sense between the two of you.

beats.title: Words Between You
beats.subtitle: The average dispatch
beats.narrative: On average, your messages were 23 characters long. Not too much, not too little. Just enough.

chapters.lead: Somehow, the deepest quiet of night always felt a little more familiar. The phone lit up a little more often.

beats.title: The 12AM Hour
beats.subtitle: When the notifications piled up
beats.narrative: 12AM. the deepest quiet of night. That was your hour. When distractions faded and conversations picked up. When reels, thoughts, and random updates found their way across.

beats.title: Night Owls
beats.subtitle: When the conversations happened
beats.narrative: The patterns tell a story. Some hours were consistently busier than others — certain times of day just felt more natural to talk.

chapters.lead: Some messages are just data. Others are little artifacts — the kind worth saving.
